subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! His honor Ali-Askar and his honor Abdul-Javad, upon them be the Glory of God, the Most Glorious! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی جناب آقا علی عسکر و جناب آقا عبدالجواد علیهما بهاء الله الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
